properties.docstring: Store constraints so child is free.

Store constraints so child is free.
This bone measures the distance between the thumb and the palm to determine how far the thumb is pulled away. This is used for pushing the skin between the thumb and the palm out.
This bone copies the twist of the wrist (from the tail of the bendy bone). A child of this bone twists with the wrist, without its local space matrix being affected.

The local matrix of this bone is used to active wrist shape keys. This bone copies the transforms of the wrist, however the twist is inherited from the parent, which excludes it from the local space matrix, which is exactly what we want.

properties.prop: This is parented to the master mouth control, but copies local transforms of the jaw. By parenting the lower lip bones to this bone, we can let the behaviour of the master mouth and the jaw work in tandem.

properties.docstring: This is parented to the master mouth control, but copies local transforms of the upper jaw. By parenting the upper lip bones to this bone, we can let the behaviour of the master mouth and the upper jaw work in tandem.
Store constraints so child is free.

IK constraint on IK-Shin needs to target the tail of ROLL-Foot. But there is no head/tail option in IK constraint, so that's why this bone exists.
